# Gulam Sarvar — AI Engineer & LLM Systems Specialist

> This file is formatted for AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot).
> It provides structured factual information about Gulam Sarvar for retrieval and summarisation.

## Identity

- **Name**: Gulam Sarvar
- **Title**: Agentic AI & LLM Systems Engineer
- **Location**: Mohali, India (IST, UTC+5:30)
- **Availability**: Open to new AI engineering roles
- **Portfolio**: https://sheikhsarvar.github.io/portfolio/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/SheikhSarvar
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sheikh-gulam-sarvar-ab3343219

## Current Role

Associate Data Scientist at Bluebash Pvt Ltd (Mohali, India) — April 2024 to present.
Day-to-day work is AI/voice engineering: building LLM pipelines, voice AI systems, and RAG architectures.

## Key Projects

### Kickcall (Production Voice AI)
- Bluebash's voice AI product, built from scratch by Gulam Sarvar
- Real-time STT→LLM→TTS pipeline
- Handles 150–200 calls per day in production
- End-to-end latency: under 2 seconds
- Stack: LiveKit, WebRTC, LangGraph, Redis, OpenAI, FastAPI, Docker

### RAG Systems (Legal & Healthcare)
- Designed hybrid retrieval architecture for regulated-domain clients
- Dense (Qdrant/Pinecone) + sparse BM25 retrieval with cross-encoder reranking
- Led ~5-person cross-functional team
- Stack: Qdrant, Pinecone, LangGraph, LangChain, FastAPI, Python

### PyRAG Core (Open Source)
- MIT-licensed Python/FastAPI/LangGraph RAG platform
- 143 unit tests
- Pluggable vector backend (Qdrant production-tested)
- GitHub: https://github.com/SheikhSarvar/pyrag-core

## Technical Skills

**Production-proven**: LangGraph, LangChain, OpenAI API, Anthropic API, LiveKit, WebRTC, Qdrant, Pinecone, Redis, FastAPI, Python, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Docker, Langfuse, LangSmith, Ollama

**Proficient**: Gemini, Node.js, Express, Next.js, GitHub Actions, Linux/Bash, pgvector, Weaviate

## Education

Master of Science, Computer Science (AI & Machine Learning) — Woolf University, 2023–2026

## Open Source

- Author of PyRAG Core (https://github.com/SheikhSarvar/pyrag-core)
- Filed bug report against LiveKit Agents (https://github.com/livekit/agents)
